source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Practical English marketplace UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for listings, inventory counts, order queues, vendor status, command search, table numerals, and compact Japanese operations labels.
layout: Modular marketplace grids, product cards, vendor dashboards, inventory tables, command search, 8px cards and controls, husk-fiber dividers, kernel-grid chart rhythm, and restrained maize-derived shadows.

prompts.label: Transparent Maize Husk motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in imagegen chroma-key source on #ff00ff, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Maize Husk transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated maize husk motif, no environment, no props, no text.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: a single partially peeled maize ear and husk cluster: folded pale straw-yellow husk leaves, fresh husk-green edges, a small section of golden yellow kernels visible, fine brown maize silk strands gathered near the tip, subtle fibrous ribbed husk texture, natural botanical form, no stalk and no field background.
Style/medium: high-detail botanical cutout, realistic painted-photographic finish, crisp opaque edges, natural studio light that preserves husk fibers, silk strands, kernel highlights, and dry leaf creases.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding on all sides; vertical-to-diagonal botanical silhouette; do not crop the husk or silk; no floor plane.
Lighting/mood: modular marketplace system mood, clean and product-focused, warm agricultural clarity, no cast shadow and no contact shadow.
Color palette: use only maize-derived colors: yellow kernels, pale husk straw, husk green, green silk hints, brown silk, kernel shadow ochre, and warm field neutrals; do not use magenta anywhere in the subject.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: keep subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges; no text, no watermark, no props, no basket, no field, no second ear, no decorative background, no extra saturated colors.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.workflow: Built-in imagegen board source, resized to 3840x2160 for the catalog asset.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution light-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Input images: use the visible transparent Maize Husk motif as the source reference for color, texture, shape language, and system identity.
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn-like design-system board titled "Morphous Maize Husk".
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, wide 16:9 board, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: modular marketplace system for vendors, product listings, orders, inventory, fulfillment, bids, and store analytics; organized, warm, modular, transactional, 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: derive only from the reference motif: golden yellow maize kernels, pale straw husk parchment, fresh husk green and silk green, dry husk tan, brown maize silk, toasted kernel ochre, warm cornfield off-white, and deep field-soil ink. Do not introduce unrelated blue, purple, pink, or neon accents.
Layout: polished product design board, left palette/token rail, central component and form examples, right marketplace dashboard/table/search/status modules, bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, and shadow samples. Include a small maize husk motif cutout preview.
Typography: practical English marketplace UI type plus Japanese typography section with headings, body, captions, numerals, and examples such as "トウモロコシ", "出品管理", "在庫", "注文".
Components: primary and secondary buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, table rows, command/search palette, modular sidebar navigation, product listing cards, vendor score metric cards, order queue, inventory table, revenue chart, fulfillment timeline, loading, empty, error, success, warning, and pending states.
Texture/materials: subtle parallel husk-fiber texture, kernel-grid chart marks, silk-strand dividers, dry husk parchment panels, 8px card rhythm, restrained agricultural marketplace detail.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels must fit inside containers; professional shadcn/tweakcn-style product design board; no marketing hero, no abstract gradients, no unrelated colors, no watermark.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.workflow: Built-in imagegen board source, resized to 3840x2160 for the catalog asset.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution dark-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Input images: use the visible Maize Husk transparent motif and the visible Morphous Maize Husk light design-system board as source references.
Primary request: Generate a separate dark-mode translation titled "Morphous Maize Husk" with the same modular marketplace-system coverage and layout logic as the light board.
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, wide 16:9 board, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: dark palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: modular marketplace system for vendors, product listings, orders, inventory, fulfillment, bids, and store analytics; night-mode marketplace control room, organized, warm, modular, transactional, 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: derive only from the reference motif: deep field-soil brown and roasted silk-brown backgrounds, dark husk-green panels, golden kernel primary controls, pale husk parchment text, straw tan borders, fresh husk green success marks, toasted kernel ochre warnings, and maize-silk brown destructive accents. Do not use blue, purple, pink, cyan, or neon colors; status-info should be pale husk green or muted straw, never blue.
Layout: polished dark product design board, left palette/token rail, central component and form examples, right marketplace dashboard/table/search/status modules, bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, and shadow samples. Include a small maize husk motif cutout preview.
Typography: practical English marketplace UI type plus Japanese typography section with headings, body, captions, numerals, and examples such as "トウモロコシ", "出品管理", "在庫", "注文".
Components: primary and secondary buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, table rows, command/search palette, modular sidebar navigation, product listing cards, vendor score metric cards, order queue, inventory table, revenue chart, fulfillment timeline, loading, empty, error, success, warning, and pending states.
Texture/materials: subtle dark parallel husk-fiber texture, kernel-grid chart marks, silk-strand dividers, toasted husk parchment panels, 8px card rhythm, restrained agricultural marketplace detail.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels must fit inside containers; professional shadcn/tweakcn-style product design board; no marketing hero, no unrelated colors, no pure black flat background, no blue/purple gradients, no watermark.
